en: And all the people of Judah took Uzziah, who was sixteen years old, and made him king instead of his father Amaziah.
zh: 全猶大的人民立烏西雅 接續他的父親亞瑪謝作王，那時他才十六歲。

en: He built Eloth and restored it to Judah, after the king slept with his fathers.
zh: 亞瑪謝王和列祖同睡以後，烏西雅重建以祿，並且收歸猶大所有。

en: Uzziah was sixteen years old when he began to reign, and he reigned fifty-two years in Jerusalem. His mother's name was Jecoliah of Jerusalem.
zh: 烏西雅登基的時候，是十六歲；他在耶路撒冷作王共五十二年。他的母親名叫耶可利雅，是耶路撒冷人。

en: And he did what was right in the eyes of the LORD, according to all that his father Amaziah had done.
zh: 烏西雅行耶和華看為正的事，像他的父親亞瑪謝一切所行的。

en: He set himself to seek God in the days of Zechariah, who instructed him in the fear of God, and as long as he sought the LORD, God made him prosper.
zh: 撒迦利亞在世的日子，教導烏西雅敬畏 神，所以烏西雅常常尋求 神；烏西雅尋求 神的時候， 神就使他亨通。

en: He went out and made war against the Philistines and broke through the wall of Gath and the wall of Jabneh and the wall of Ashdod, and he built cities in the territory of Ashdod and elsewhere among the Philistines.
zh: 他出去攻打非利士人，拆毀了迦特的城牆、雅比尼的城牆和亞實突的城牆；又在亞實突境內非利士人中，建造了幾座城。

en: God helped him against the Philistines and against the Arabians who lived in Gurbaal and against the Meunites.
zh: 神幫助他攻打非利士人和住在姑珥．巴力的阿拉伯人，以及米烏尼人。

en: The Ammonites paid tribute to Uzziah, and his fame spread even to the border of Egypt, for he became very strong.
zh: 亞捫人給烏西雅進貢，他的名聲傳到埃及的邊境，因為他極其強盛。

en: Moreover, Uzziah built towers in Jerusalem at the Corner Gate and at the Valley Gate and at the Angle, and fortified them.
zh: 烏西雅在耶路撒冷的角門、谷門和城牆轉角的地方，建築了城樓，這些城樓非常堅固。

en: And he built towers in the wilderness and cut out many cisterns, for he had large herds, both in the Shephelah and in the plain, and he had farmers and vinedressers in the hills and in the fertile lands, for he loved the soil.
zh: 他又在曠野建造了一些瞭望樓，挖了許多貯水池，因為他在高原和平原上有很多牲畜；又因為他喜愛種植，所以在山地上和果園裡，雇有農夫和修剪葡萄樹的工人。

en: Moreover, Uzziah had an army of soldiers, fit for war, in divisions according to the numbers in the muster made by Jeiel the secretary and Maaseiah the officer, under the direction of Hananiah, one of the king's commanders.
zh: 烏西雅又有善於作戰的軍隊，照著書記耶利和官長瑪西雅數點的數目，由王的一個將軍哈拿尼雅指揮，編隊上陣。

en: The whole number of the heads of fathers' houses of mighty men of valor was 2,600.
zh: 這些英勇戰士中的各家族首領，總數共二千六百人。

en: Under their command was an army of 307,500, who could make war with mighty power, to help the king against the enemy.
zh: 在他們指揮下的軍隊，共有三十萬七千五百人，都是大有能力，善於作戰的，能幫助王攻打仇敵。

en: And Uzziah prepared for all the army shields, spears, helmets, coats of mail, bows, and stones for slinging.
zh: 烏西雅給全隊軍兵配備了盾牌、矛槍、頭盔、鎧甲、弓箭和用機弦甩的石頭。

en: In Jerusalem he made engines, invented by skillful men, to be on the towers and the corners, to shoot arrows and great stones. And his fame spread far, for he was marvelously helped, till he was strong.
zh: 他又在耶路撒冷製造巧匠發明的器械，安放在城樓和城角上，用來發射利箭和大石。烏西雅的名聲傳到遠方，因為他得了非常的幫助，使他十分強盛。

en: But when he was strong, he grew proud, to his destruction. For he was unfaithful to the LORD his God and entered the temple of the LORD to burn incense on the altar of incense.
zh: 烏西雅強盛起來，就心高氣傲，以致自尋毀滅，竟冒犯耶和華他的 神；他進了耶和華的殿，要在香壇上燒香。

en: But Azariah the priest went in after him, with eighty priests of the LORD who were men of valor,
zh: 跟隨烏西雅進去的，有亞撒利雅祭司，還有耶和華的祭司八十個，都是英勇的人。

en: and they withstood King Uzziah and said to him, "It is not for you, Uzziah, to burn incense to the LORD, but for the priests the sons of Aaron, who are consecrated to burn incense. Go out of the sanctuary, for you have done wrong, and it will bring you no honor from the LORD God."
zh: 他們阻止烏西雅王，對他說：“烏西雅啊，給耶和華燒香不是你應作的事，而是亞倫的子孫作祭司的事，他們是分別為聖作燒香的事；請離開聖所吧，因為你作了不應該作的事了，你必不能從耶和華 神那裡得著尊榮。”

en: Then Uzziah was angry. Now he had a censer in his hand to burn incense, and when he became angry with the priests, leprosy broke out on his forehead in the presence of the priests in the house of the LORD, by the altar of incense.
zh: 於是烏西雅十分忿怒，手裡拿著香爐正要燒香，他向眾祭司發怒的時候，就在耶和華的殿裡香壇旁邊眾祭司的面前，他的額上忽然長出了大痲風。

en: And Azariah the chief priest and all the priests looked at him, and behold, he was leprous in his forehead! And they rushed him out quickly, and he himself hurried to go out, because the LORD had struck him.
zh: 大祭司亞撒利雅和眾祭司看著他，忽然見他的額上長了大痲風，就急忙催他出殿；他自己也急忙出去，因為耶和華擊打了他。

en: And King Uzziah was a leper to the day of his death, and being a leper lived in a separate house, for he was excluded from the house of the LORD. And Jotham his son was over the king's household, governing the people of the land.
zh: 烏西雅王長大痲風直到死的時候；他既然長了大痲風，就住在一間隔離的房子裡，不能進耶和華的殿。他的兒子約坦執掌朝政，治理國民。

en: Now the rest of the acts of Uzziah, from first to last, Isaiah the prophet the son of Amoz wrote.
zh: 烏西雅其餘的事蹟，一生的始末，亞摩斯的兒子以賽亞先知都記下來了。

en: And Uzziah slept with his fathers, and they buried him with his fathers in the burial field that belonged to the kings, for they said, "He is a leper." And Jotham his son reigned in his place.
zh: 烏西雅和他的列祖同睡；由於有人說：“他是個長大痲風的人”，所以把他埋葬在王陵的田間，和他的列祖一起。他的兒子約坦接續他作王。
